summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Estalara landing page Problem and Benefits sections. All Problem section updates implemented correctly with proper content, styling, and animations. Benefits section continues to work perfectly with 5 cards and Card 2 highlighted.
passed_tests: Problem section heading: 'Views don't sell properties. Buyers do.' displays correctly
Problem section subheading: 'Your listings get views. Estalara brings you buyers who are ready to talk seriously.' shows correctly
Problem label: 'THE PROBLEM' displays in uppercase
All 3 problem cards render with correct titles: Visibility, No More Barriers, Your Brand Comes First
Visibility card has correct 2-paragraph content about portals vs real buyers
No More Barriers card has correct 3-paragraph content including 'You speak only with serious buyers'
Your Brand Comes First card has correct 3-paragraph content including 'trusted entry point for investors'
All problem cards have correct data-testid attributes (problem-card-0, 1, 2)
Problem section has correct dark background (#1A1A1A)
Problem cards display with scroll reveal animation
Multi-line paragraph content displays correctly with whitespace: pre-line CSS
Benefits section works correctly with 5 cards
Benefits Card 2 (Award icon) is properly highlighted with gold styling
Both sections are fully responsive on mobile and desktop
All interactive elements and animations function properly
